{{Infobox starship
| name = Sky's Mercy
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Sky's Mercy Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Sky's [[Mercy]] is a cloudship owned by the Patriarch of the [[Arelius family]]. Functioning as a mobile base, it allows the family to conduct business outside of their standard territory. The vessel consists of a large blue cloud with a house situated in its center, and it is capable of landing on the ground to allow constructs to recharge. The interior of the ship includes a bar, a training room, a washroom, six bedrooms, and a silent chamber used for cycling. It also features a control board for navigation and an invisible web of power that provides information regarding the occupants. While it serves as a home for [[Cassias Arelius]], the ship was eventually destroyed, leaving wreckage scattered across a mountainside.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Sky's [[Mercy]] is a cloudship vessel that serves as the personal flying house for the Patriarch of the [[Arelius family]]. This mobile building functions as a vessel for descent and features various amenities, including a reservoir, six bedrooms, a washroom, and a bar. The interior also contains a training room, a silent chamber for cycling, and a control board used to navigate the ship. Both [[Lindon]] and his companions have traveled aboard this vessel, which [[Cassias]] has previously identified as a vessel.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sky's Mercy]] is a vessel [[Cassias]] mentions.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sky's Mercy]] is the personal cloudship of the [[Arelius family]] Patriarch.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sky's Mercy]] is a cloudship.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sky's Mercy]] is a flying building/house.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sky's Mercy]] has a reservoir.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sky's Mercy]] is a vessel with a control board.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sky's Mercy]] contains six bedrooms, a washroom, a bar, a training room, and a silent chamber for cycling.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sky's Mercy]] is a vessel used for descent.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sky's Mercy]] is a vessel that [[Lindon]] and others have traveled on.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8" />}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Sky's Mercy]] is a location where [[Lindon]] is currently staying.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Sky's Mercy]] was wrecked on the side of a mountain.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
